title: Embers
content:
As you enter into dream - 
        its the unconsciousness
        which stifles,
        the thin embers
        called flame
        that outdistance
        the controlled rubric
        of desire.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Paul Cameron Brown delivers a powerful performance in "Embers"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
